name: livestage
description: Local-dev convenience runner for the LiveStage backend, portal, and docs site.

scripts.setup: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix portal install && npm --prefix docs-site install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,portal -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix portal run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,portal,docs -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix portal run dev" "npm --prefix docs-site run dev"
